title: globularia majoricensis
intro: Globularia majoricensis, also known as Majorcan globularia or island globularia, is a flowering plant species native to the Balearic Islands, specifically found in the island of Mallorca. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as possessing potential antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Globularia majoricensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and other respiratory conditions.
